careers.title: Fashion industry
achievements: In charge of the brand, Jean Paul Gaultier
careers.description: I preferred to use the pure white, compact Macintosh Classic II, the only one in my department at the time, which was a clear departure from the spacious machines so-called “office computers”.

careers.title: Printing business
achievements: Introduced a full system in the early days of DTP and improved gross profit margins
1995: Started my career as a designer
Realized what is now called SFA+CRM with FileMaker

careers.title: Freelancer
achievements: 100+ various scales of web projects for clients

careers.title: Web Consulting
achievements: A bold one-sheet and impactful landing page I created helped the company in its early stage launch what would become their flagship service
While analyzing 300+ websites and tuning HTML for SEO, I also deepened my understanding of web accessibility and web semantics

children.title: Editor in Chief
children.description: A member newspaper for an association with 6 million members

children.title: Advisor, Mentor
children.description: A startup in its second year

children.title: Senior Curator, CEO
children.description: A joint venture between a web consulting company and a major IT company
